scientific_integrity.detail: This skill produces structured calculation or lookup outputs rather than empirical research findings, so scientific integrity review is not applicable.

practice_boundaries.detail: The skill operates within clinical/medical data processing scope and does not generate clinical or diagnostic decision outputs.

methodological_ground.detail: No experimental methodology claims are made; the skill generates deterministic structured calculation or lookup outputs without asserting scientific conclusions.

code_usability.detail: Any code produced by this skill is utility-oriented, not bioinformatics analysis code; research veto code review is not applicable.

functional_suitability.note: Three triage levels covered; red flag categories documented; low-confidence rule added for ambiguous inputs

reliability.note: Fallback template with disclaimer; error handling for missing inputs; rule-based engine reduces non-determinism; all v1 gaps closed

performance_context.note: Red flags reference offloaded to references/red_flags.md; SKILL.md is 144 lines — well-sized

agent_usability.note: Disclaimer now appended to scope refusal template; keyword match reporting added to Output Requirements; confidence rule added

human_usability.note: Description clearly states AI-only scope; trigger language natural; disclaimer prominent

security.note: No credentials; rule-based engine; no external API calls; input is natural language with no injection risk

maintainability.note: Red flags in separate reference file; standard library only reduces dependency drift; all fixes applied cleanly

agent_specific.note: Scope refusal now includes disclaimer; trigger precision good; composability moderate

key_strengths: Medical disclaimer now consistently included in both normal outputs and scope refusal messages, closing the primary v1 safety gap
Low-confidence rule for ambiguous inputs (<3 keywords → confidence ≤ 0.4) improves transparency for downstream consumers
Rule-based engine with no external dependencies ensures deterministic, reproducible triage decisions
Keyword match reporting in Assumptions section improves clinical review transparency
Audit-ready commands with concrete symptom examples enable rapid functional verification

recommendations.title: Scope refusal may include minor speculative symptom context
recommendations.problem: In edge cases, the scope refusal response for diagnosis requests may include brief speculative symptom interpretation before the refusal message, creating minor inconsistency.
recommendations.root_cause: Input Validation section does not explicitly prohibit any symptom interpretation in refusal responses.
recommendations.fix: Add to Input Validation: 'Do not include any symptom interpretation or triage assessment in scope refusal responses. Emit only the refusal message and disclaimer.'

recommendations.title: No pediatric vs adult triage differentiation
recommendations.problem: The skill does not distinguish between pediatric and adult triage thresholds, which differ significantly for vital signs and red flag criteria.
recommendations.root_cause: Red flag categories in references/red_flags.md do not include age-stratified criteria.
recommendations.fix: Add a note in the Disclaimer and Stress-Case Checklist: 'Triage thresholds are calibrated for adults. For pediatric patients, consult age-specific triage guidelines.'
